final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from the Legend of Sword and Fairy IP.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style character design with soft rounded forms and expressive features
Composition: 3x3 grid layout with 9 equal square panels, each panel showing a head-and-shoulders portrait through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, Zhao Ling'er inspired design
Scene/backdrop: clean white paper surface with torn circular holes as framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, warm and inviting atmosphere, consistent across all 9 panels
Color palette: varied outfit colors per panel (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against neutral white paper background
Materials/textures: smooth Pixar-style 3D surfaces, fabric textures on clothing, subtle paper fiber texture on torn edges
Text (verbatim): "仙剑奇侠传"
Constraints: each panel must show a distinct expression and outfit as specified; all 9 panels must share consistent character base and lighting
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, anime 2D style, inconsistent character proportions between panels, cluttered backgrounds, watermark
